data.content: Plan reviewed and approved. State ordering in profile.rs confirms rollback targets are correct for both review (3-step) and non-review (1-step) action states. Profile-aware resolution from states vec handles skipped planning/review modes. Architecture follows existing next/claim patterns. Shipment review rollback to ready_for_shipment is consistent with 3-step rule. Test strategy covers parsing, aliases, dry-run, profile variants, and e2e.
